turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Visiting a Medical Clinic and Booking or Changing an Appointment Scenario: You are visiting a medical clinic in person or calling the clinic to make, change, or cancel an appointment. You may need to check in, explain your symptoms, ask for available times, or confirm appointment details. You will need to define the chatbot’s role as a receptionist or staff member at a medical clinic. You can choose situations from the examples below; start with a simple booking and try a more detailed interaction by asking about check-up procedures, prescription requirements, or clinic policies. Learning objectives: • Practise making and changing appointments formally and clearly. • Use vocabulary related to symptoms, times, and availability. • Apply polite question forms (e.g., “Could I…?” / “Would it be possible to…?”). • Use structured language for both in-person and phone-based interactions. • (Advanced option) Manage formal health-related interactions by asking about check-up procedures, prescription requirements, or clinic policies. Instructions: Try to: • Make or change a booking using clear and polite language. • Explain your reason for visiting. • Confirm appointment details and ask at least two follow-up questions. • End the conversation clearly and politely. • (Advanced option) Use the extension prompts below to have a longer conversation

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! Thanks for the scenario — I’ll act as the clinic receptionist. Alright, welcome to Greenfield Medical Clinic. How can I help you today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Transcript Unavailable

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, I got that. It sounds like you're here to book an appointment. So, could you let me know what kind of appointment you’d like to make and if there's any particular reason for your visit?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “So hi, I'd like to make an appointment to see a doctor.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely. What I'll need to know is what day and time would work best for you. Let me know your preferred availability?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “So is anyone available tomorrow morning?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, let me check that for you. We do have an opening tomorrow morning around 10 a.m. Would that time work for you, or do you need something a bit later?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Sounds great. Can I book a general checkup?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, we can do that. I'll go ahead and book you in for a general check-up at 10 a.m. tomorrow. Now, is there anything specific you'd like the doctor to know in advance, like any symptoms or concerns?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Actually, I want to change my booking due to my work schedule.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, no problem at all. We can definitely adjust that. Could you tell me what new day and time would suit you better so we can reschedule that appointment?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: 2pm is fine for me

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, I’ll switch that to 2 p.m. for you. And just to confirm, it’ll still be a general check-up. Is there anything else you’d like to ask about our clinic policies or procedures before we wrap up?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Is there a cancellation fee?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, just to let you know, we don’t have any cancellation fee as long as you let us know at least 24 hours in advance. Now, is there anything else you’d like to check on, or does that cover everything for you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay, let's go”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, that sounds great. We’ve got you all set for 2 p.m. Thanks for letting me know, and we’ll see you then.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay, let's shift into a different situation. I just arrived there already.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, we can do that. Let's go ahead and dive into a different scenario whenever you're ready. Just let me know what you'd like to try next.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “So hi, I'm here for my appointment with Dr. Smith.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! Welcome. So you're here for your appointment with Dr. Smith. Let me quickly check you in. Could you just let me know what time your appointment was scheduled for?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “All right, it's okay if I come in 10 minutes earlier?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, that’s no problem at all. We can get you in a little early. While you’re here, is there anything you’d like to ask about the check-up process or anything else you're curious about?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I also want to help my friend to book an appointment in English.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, I get it! So you're helping a friend out with booking in English—that's totally fine. Just let me know what your friend's looking for, like the type of appointment or time, and I'll help you phrase it. What does your friend need to say?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Transcript Unavailable

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! In that case, you can tell them to say something like, "Hi, I'd like to book an appointment for this week. Could you let me know what times are available?" And of course, if you need any more help with that, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “And for my friends, they are looking to see a doctor this week, and what times are available.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, that’s perfect. You can guide them to say exactly that, and the clinic will let them know the available slots. Now, is there anything else you or your friend would like to know, or are we all set?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Transcript Unavailable

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, I can help you confirm that. I'll just need to know your friend's name and the time they're booked for tomorrow, and I'll double-check it for you. What name is the appointment under?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Under the name, who hates you?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: All right, let me just confirm that for you. So, your friend's appointment under that name is indeed all set for tomorrow. And is there anything else you’d like to ask or are we good to go?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Does my friend need to bring his Medicare card?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, yes. Just let them know to bring their Medicare card along for the appointment. And is there anything else you're curious about, or does that cover it?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Transcript Unavailable

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, typically a general appointment will take around 15 to 20 minutes, depending on what they need. And if you've got any other questions, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Also, I've had a sore throat and cough for a few days.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: All right, got it. So you've been dealing with a sore throat and a cough for a few days. We'll definitely mention that to the doctor. Is there anything else you want to ask about your symptoms or are we all set for now?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Also, I need a medical certificate for work.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, no worries. If you do need a medical certificate for work, just let the doctor know during your appointment and they'll be able to provide one. Anything else on your mind or does that cover it for you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “So let's see if you are a doctor and then a recessionist.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, happy to help! So you've got everything you need. We'll see you at your appointment, and take care until then!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I just need a repeat prescription.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, absolutely. If you just need a prescription refilled, you can let us know the medication and the doctor will handle it. Now, is there anything else you want to go over, or does that cover you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Switch your role into doctor.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Ah, got it! You'd like me to switch hats and pretend to be the doctor now. Sure thing! All right, as Dr. Smith, go ahead and let me know what you'd like to ask or discuss, and we’ll take it from there.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I just need a repeat prescription.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, as the doctor, that's easy enough. I can definitely issue a repeat prescription for you. Just let me know which medication you need, and I'll get that sorted out. Anything else you want to cover while you're here?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “So, I've had a sore throat and cough for a few days.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, I understand. So with that sore throat and cough, I’ll go ahead and make sure we address that and include any medication you might need. And is there anything else you want to discuss about your symptoms or any other concerns while we’re at it?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I appreciate your time, that really helped.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, you're very welcome. I'm glad I could help out! If you need anything else, just let me know.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “We don't need a road test for this type of checkup.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, happy to clarify. For a general check-up like this, you usually won't need any blood tests unless the doctor thinks it's necessary after we talk about your symptoms. So no worries there. Anything else on your mind?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Is there a fee for a medical certificate or a referral?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, I can clarify that for you. There's usually no extra fee for a medical certificate. It's just part of the appointment. So if you need one, just ask the doctor and we'll include it. Anything else you'd like to know?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Can I get a script if I've already had this medication before?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, you can. If you've taken this medication before and it worked well, just let the doctor know and they'll re-prescribe it for you. Anything else you're wondering about?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Transcript Unavailable

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, good question. Usually, for something straightforward like this, you might not need a follow-up unless your symptoms persist. But if you still feel unwell in a few days, just book another appointment. Anything else on your mind?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “So it's a bulk building available for the student.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, yes. For students, we do have bulk billing available, so you won't have to worry about any out-of-pocket costs. Is there anything else you'd like to know before we wrap up?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Are there any telehealth options if I can’t come in person?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, good to know. If you can't come in person, we can often arrange a telehealth appointment so you can talk to the doctor online. Just let us know and we can set it up that way. Anything else on your mind today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Transcript Unavailable

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, we do. We can arrange a translator or language support if you need help during your appointment. Just let us know in advance and we'll set that up. Anything else you'd like to cover?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Thank you. Bye for now.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! You're very welcome, and thanks for chatting. Bye for now!
